question.text: Trustees must obtain consent of unitholders when requisitioned by what proportion of unit-holders of any scheme?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Trustees shall obtain unitholders' consent whenever required to do so on the requisition made by three-fourths of the unit-holders of any scheme. **The Trap:** Two-thirds is the proportion for independent trustees, not for unitholder requisition. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** The high threshold of 75% prevents frivolous demands on the trust.
